Off Calendar Dec-08-2014 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (200 San Jose Ave., San Francisco, Ca 94110)
Off Calendar Jul-11-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Darcey Wong for Debra Dolch (Administrator).

The sale was confirmed at $1,804,000.00 to Jonathan Ennis and Arline Klatte based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed June 19, 2014. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $1,307,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
